title: Spartanfire x Epicfight
description: A combability datapack for spartanfire mod and epicfight
body:
I added animation for most of the weapons in the spartanfire mod to be combatible with epic fight.

required:
- [Epicfight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)
- [Spartan Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry)
- [Ice and Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons)
- [Spartan Weaponry: Ice and Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry-ice-and-fire)
